subject: A massive tentacled aquatic creature submerged in murky water, Eldrazi-type entity
description: A large, bloated aquatic monstrosity fills the frame, submerged in dim green-lit water. The creature has a roughly humanoid upper torso that gives way to numerous thick writhing tentacles below. Its surface is heavily textured with rough, encrusted organic material, barnacle-like protrusions, and overlapping ridged plates. The figure looms upward toward the surface, backlit from above by diffuse greenish light filtering through the water. Additional smaller tentacles trail from the sides. The overall silhouette is massive and imposing, conveying something enormous and alien rising from ocean depths.
foreground: Massive tentacled aquatic creature, rough organic body, multiple thick tentacles
background: Murky underwater environment with diffuse green light filtering from above, dark depths below
emotion: No readable face; body language conveys rising, looming threat
